content: Eiffel Tower: Iconic landmark with breathtaking views. Located in Paris, France.

Dining in Paris: Boulangerie breakfast costs around €8; Casual bistro lunch €20; Seated dinner €40.
Dining in Rome: Trattoria pasta bowl €12-15; Gelato €3-5; Pizza al taglio €5.
Dining in Barcelona: Tapas dinner €15-20; Set lunch (Menu del Dia) €12-15; Coffee €2.
Dining in Berlin: Currywurst €5; Döner kebab €7; Beer in pub €4.
Dining in Amsterdam: Pancakes €12; Herring snack €5; Indonesian Rijsttafel €30.
Dining in Zurich: Basic lunch €25; Cheese fondue €35; Coffee €6.
Dining in Madrid: Churros con chocolate €5; Calamari sandwich €8; Dinner at Mercado de San Miguel €25.
Dining in Munich: Pretzel €2; Beer garden meal €15; Schnitzel €18.
Dining in Geneva: Swiss chocolate box €15; Lakefront lunch €30; Dinner €50.
Dining in Oslo: Salmon dish €30; Local brown cheese snack €5; Coffee €7.
Dining in Bergen: Fish soup €18; Reindeer burger €25; Local cider €12.
Transport from Barcelona to Madrid: AVE High-speed train: €40-90, Duration: 2.5 hours.
Transport from Paris to Lyon: TGV train: €30-70, Duration: 2 hours.
Transport from Rome to Florence: Trenitalia: €20-50, Duration: 1.5 hours.
Transport from Amsterdam to Rotterdam: Intercity train: €15, Duration: 40 minutes.
Transport from Berlin to Munich: ICE train: €45-120, Duration: 4 hours.
Transport from Zurich to Geneva: SBB train: €50-90, Duration: 2.8 hours.
Transport from Paris to Versailles: RER C train: €4, Duration: 45 minutes.
Transport from Madrid to Seville: AVE train: €35-75, Duration: 2.5 hours.
Transport from Milan to Venice: Frecciarossa train: €25-60, Duration: 2.2 hours.
Transport from Amsterdam to The Hague: NS train: €12, Duration: 50 minutes.
Transport from Oslo to Bergen: Bergensbanen: €70-120, Duration: 7 hours.
